user.title: Create virtual consumer
user.description: Create an Energy Device Bridge virtual consumer with a persistent Energy Dashboard total and swappable source entities.

data.notify_on_lower_non_zero: Create persistent notification for lower non-zero source values
data.copy_source_history_on_create: Copy/import available source history into bridge statistics after creating this bridge

error.duplicate_pair: This source power/energy pair is already used.
error.entity_not_found: The selected entity does not exist.
error.must_be_sensor: The selected entity must be a sensor.
error.same_entity_pair: Power and energy entities must be different.

error.energy_not_numeric: Energy source must have numeric values.

init.title: Configure virtual consumer
init.description: Update this Energy Device Bridge consumer from the configuration menu.

data.notify_on_lower_non_zero: Create persistent notification for lower non-zero source values
data.copy_source_history_on_create: Copy/import available source history into bridge statistics after creating this bridge

error.duplicate_pair: This source power/energy pair is already used.
error.entity_not_found: The selected entity does not exist.
error.must_be_sensor: The selected entity must be a sensor.
error.same_entity_pair: Power and energy entities must be different.
error.power_not_numeric: Power source must have numeric values.
error.energy_not_numeric: Energy source must have numeric values.

options.ignore_zero_until_non_zero: Ignore zero until first non-zero reading
options.accept_zero_as_new_cycle: Accept zero immediately as new cycle baseline

source_entity_missing.title: Configured source sensor is missing
source_entity_missing.description: The configured source sensor `{entity_id}` no longer exists. Update the integration configuration to select a valid source.

energy_unit_unsupported.title: Configured energy unit is unsupported
energy_unit_unsupported.description: Energy source unit `{unit}` is unsupported. Use an energy sensor reporting `Wh` or `kWh`.

power_unit_unsupported.title: Configured power unit is unsupported
power_unit_unsupported.description: Power source unit `{unit}` is unsupported. Use a power sensor reporting `W` or `kW`.

energy_state_class_invalid.title: Energy source state class is invalid
energy_state_class_invalid.description: Energy source state_class `{state_class}` is invalid. Use `total` or `total_increasing`.

history_import_in_progress.message: A source history import is already running for this bridge.

service_entry_not_found.message: Energy Device Bridge entry `{entry_id}` was not found.

service_entry_not_loaded.message: The selected Energy Device Bridge entry is not loaded.

service_entity_wrong_domain.message: Entity `{entity_id}` does not belong to Energy Device Bridge.

service_energy_sensor_unavailable.message: The bridge energy sensor is not available yet.

service_requires_energy_entity.message: Entity `{entity_id}` must be an Energy Device Bridge energy sensor.

adopt_current_source_as_baseline.name: Adopt current source as baseline
adopt_current_source_as_baseline.description: Read the current valid source energy value and store it as the baseline without changing the virtual total.

reset_tracker.name: Reset tracker
reset_tracker.description: Clear tracker metadata and baseline, then reset the virtual total to 0 kWh.

set_virtual_total.name: Set virtual total
set_virtual_total.description: Set the virtual cumulative total explicitly in kWh.

value_kwh.name: Virtual total (kWh)
value_kwh.description: New virtual total value in kWh.

import_source_history.name: Import source history
import_source_history.description: Replay available source history through bridge logic and import historical bridge statistics for one bridge instance.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target Energy Device Bridge config entry ID.

cleanup_recorder_data.name: Cleanup recorder data
cleanup_recorder_data.description: Purge recorder history/events and clear statistics for selected entities.
